title: Nước Chấm

sections.heading: Cách làm · Instructions
steps: Combine the sugar, soy sauce, soy paste, chili sauce, and fish sauce in a small bowl. Stir until the sugar is completely dissolved.
Taste and adjust to your liking.
Serve alongside bột chiên, gỏi cuốn, bánh cuốn, or other dishes.

scan_label: Công thức gốc · Original handwritten recipe
